item.title: Version 0.7.0
item.description:
What's New in v0.7.0

  • **Dashboard Hero Card** — New unified card showing today's voice input stats (characters, sessions, recording time) with comparison to weekly average
  • **Streak tracking** — Consecutive daily usage counter with fire pill indicator
  • **All Time stats in Hero Card** — Lifetime sessions, characters, and time saved displayed below today's stats
  • **Persistent today/streak data** — All stats survive history deletion and app restarts, stored independently via AppStorage
  • **Word count accuracy** — Now counts CJK characters alongside space-separated words for accurate Japanese/Chinese text counting
  • **DateFormatter caching** — Static formatter instance for better performance during backfill operations
